description: [Riso] Bulk Publish by Student – Publish Modal
suite: [Riso] Bulk Publish by Student – Publish Modal

title: [Riso] Bulk Publish Modal – 0 Students in Calendar Filter – "Apply to selected students" checkbox is disabled
description: AC 01.2 — Decision Table — When no student is selected in the Calendar filter before opening the Bulk Publish modal, the "Apply to selected students" checkbox appears but cannot be activated.
preconditions:
- User is logged into SF as a Riso HQ Admin
- The SF Calendar page is open for a specific period
- No student is selected in the Calendar student filter (filter is empty / "All students")
- At least one Draft lesson exists in the calendar period
steps_result:
1. "Open the SF Calendar, confirm the student filter shows no selected student"
2. "Click the Bulk Publish button"
3. "Observe the 'Apply to selected students' checkbox in the modal"
4. "Attempt to click the disabled checkbox"
steps_data:
1. "Calendar page is loaded; student filter shows 'All students' or no selection"
2. "Bulk Publish modal opens"
3. "Checkbox is visible but disabled (grayed out, not clickable)"
4. "Checkbox state does not change; no error shown"

title: [Riso] Bulk Publish Modal – 0 Students in Filter – Location Field Remains Editable with Multi-Location Support
description: AC 01.2 — Decision Table — When the "Apply to selected students" checkbox is disabled (0 students in filter), the Location field remains editable and the user can select multiple locations.
preconditions:
- User is logged into SF as a Riso HQ Admin
- SF Calendar is open with no student selected in the filter
- At least 2 locations exist and are accessible to the user
steps_result:
1. "Open the SF Calendar with no student in the filter, then click Bulk Publish"
2. "Observe the Location field in the modal"
3. "Click the Location field and add a second location"
4. "Confirm both locations are shown in the Location field"
steps_data:
1. "Bulk Publish modal opens; 'Apply to selected students' checkbox is disabled"
2. "Location field is editable (not locked, not read-only); shows the calendar's current location by default"
3. "Second location is added successfully to the field"
4. "Location field displays both selected locations"

title: [Riso] Bulk Publish Modal – 1+ Students in Calendar Filter – Checkbox Appears Enabled and Unchecked by Default
description: AC 01.3 — Decision Table — When at least one student is selected in the Calendar filter before opening the Bulk Publish modal, the "Apply to selected students" checkbox is enabled and unchecked by default.
preconditions:
- User is logged into SF as a Riso HQ Admin
- SF Calendar is open
- At least 1 student (Student A) is selected in the Calendar student filter
- At least one Draft lesson for Student A exists in the calendar period
steps_result:
1. "On the SF Calendar, select Student A in the student filter"
2. "Click the Bulk Publish button"
3. "Observe the 'Apply to selected students' checkbox"
steps_data:
1. "Calendar view updates to show Student A's lessons; student filter shows 'Student A'"
2. "Bulk Publish modal opens"
3. "Checkbox is enabled (clickable, not grayed out) and unchecked by default"

title: [Riso] Bulk Publish Modal – Checkbox Activated – Location Field Locked to Current Calendar Location
description: AC 01.3 — Decision Table — When the user activates the "Apply to selected students" checkbox, the Location field is immediately locked to the calendar's current location and becomes read-only.
preconditions:
- User is logged into SF as a Riso HQ Admin
- SF Calendar is open; student filter has 1+ students selected
- The calendar's current location is "Hanoi Branch"
- Bulk Publish modal is open; checkbox is currently unchecked
steps_result:
1. "Open the Bulk Publish modal (checkbox enabled, unchecked)"
2. "Tick the 'Apply to selected students' checkbox"
3. "Observe the Location field immediately after activating the checkbox"
4. "Attempt to click or change the Location field"
steps_data:
1. "Modal is open; Location field shows calendar's current location and is editable"
2. "Checkbox becomes checked"
3. "Location field is locked to 'Hanoi Branch'; field shows disabled / read-only state"
4. "Location field cannot be edited; the value 'Hanoi Branch' remains unchanged"

title: [Riso] Bulk Publish Modal – Checkbox Activated – Cannot Add Extra Locations
description: AC 01.3 — Negative Testing — When the "Apply to selected students" checkbox is activated, the option to add extra locations to the Location field is disabled.
preconditions:
- User is logged into SF as a Riso HQ Admin
- SF Calendar is open; student filter has 1+ students selected
- Bulk Publish modal is open; the 'Apply to selected students' checkbox has been activated (checked)
steps_result:
1. "Confirm the checkbox is currently checked in the modal"
2. "Attempt to open the Location field dropdown to add a second location"
3. "Confirm no additional location can be added"
steps_data:
1. "Checkbox shows checked state; Location field is locked to the calendar's location"
2. "Location field dropdown does not open; the add location control is absent or disabled"
3. "Only the single locked location is shown in the Location field"

title: [Riso] Bulk Publish Modal – Checkbox NOT Activated – All Lessons in Period Published (Existing Behavior Preserved)
description: AC 01.3 — Regression Analysis — When the "Apply to selected students" checkbox is NOT activated (even with students in the filter), Bulk Publish works exactly as before LT-98532: all lessons at the selected period and location are published regardless of student.
preconditions:
- User is logged into SF as a Riso HQ Admin
- SF Calendar is open; 1+ students are selected in the student filter
- Bulk Publish modal is open; 'Apply to selected students' checkbox is enabled but unchecked
- The period contains 3 Draft lessons: 2 for Student A, 1 for Student B (not in the filter)
steps_result:
1. "Open the Bulk Publish modal with checkbox unchecked"
2. "Complete all required fields and click Save"
3. "Refresh the calendar"
4. "Observe the status of Student A's 2 Draft lessons"
5. "Observe the status of Student B's 1 Draft lesson (not in student filter)"
steps_data:
1. "Modal is open; checkbox is enabled but unchecked"
2. "Modal closes; success message appears; user is redirected to the calendar view"
3. "Calendar loads updated lesson statuses"
4. "Both lessons are now Published"
5. "Student B's lesson is also Published — all lessons in the period were published regardless of the student filter"

title: [Riso] Bulk Publish Modal – Student Filter Cannot Be Changed While Modal Is Open
description: AC 01.3 — Decision Table — After the Bulk Publish modal is opened, the Calendar student filter cannot be modified until the modal is closed.
preconditions:
- User is logged into SF as a Riso HQ Admin
- SF Calendar is open; 1+ students selected in the student filter
- Bulk Publish modal is currently open
steps_result:
1. "Open the Bulk Publish modal"
2. "While the modal is open, attempt to change the Calendar student filter (e.g. add or remove a student)"
3. "Close the Bulk Publish modal by clicking Cancel"
4. "Attempt to change the Calendar student filter after the modal is closed"
steps_data:
1. "Modal is open and visible on top of the calendar"
2. "The student filter cannot be edited; it is blocked or the Calendar behind the modal is not interactive"
3. "Modal closes"
4. "Student filter is now editable and can be changed"
